system.requirement: Your lizard guides you into the depths.

abilities.description: Instinctive: When you @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironsworndelvemoves.Item.36c6cbe556fbb639]{Delve the Depths} +wits by trusting the lizard's instincts, ou are forewarned. On a weak hit, roll twice on @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironsworndelvemoves.Item.36c6cbe556fbb639]{Delve the Depths} the table and choose one result. If you then @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironsworndelvemoves.Item.06f78b87b9532437]{Reveal a Danger}, take +1 momentum.

Camouflaging: When you @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.c8bacc17f73d3103]{Face Danger} by hiding or @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.4dd8468e095810a4]{Secure an Advantage} by readying an ambush, add +lizard's health
Reactive: When you @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.Item.7e008d0f656dc8b3]{Clash} and roll a 10 on a challenge die, the lizard joins the fray; reroll any dice.
